---
title: "Using facetsviz"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Using facetsviz}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

`facetsviz` reads FACETS `.out` files and returns a parsed `facets_out` object.

```{r eval = FALSE}
library(facetsviz)

facets <- read_facets_out("peerAssessment.out")
names(facets$measurement_reports)
plot_wright_map(facets)
```

For batch rendering:

```{r eval = FALSE}
render_facets_plots(facets, output_dir = "figures", formats = c("png", "tiff"))
```
